macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Treasury Debt Service Reaches $3 Billion Daily
items.summary: The U.S. Treasury has paid $628 billion in net interest year-to-date to service its $39 trillion debt, averaging $3 billion per day according to the Congressional Budget Office.

items.title: Stocks Climb as April Jobs Growth Tops Estimates
items.summary: U.S. stock markets rallied as April employment growth surpassed analyst expectations, with the unemployment rate holding steady at 4.3%.

items.title: Middle East War Disrupts Global Energy Markets, Threatens Growth
items.summary: The ongoing Middle East conflict has disrupted crude oil and natural gas supplies, expected to drive inflation higher while pressuring economic growth globally, according to the Bank for International Settlements.

items.title: Canada PM Carney Escalates Criticism of Trump Trade Policies
items.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney intensified criticism of U.S. President Trump's tariff-driven trade policies, warning that the global trade order is collapsing amid escalating tensions between the two nations.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges to $82,430 Amid Trump’s Scathing Iran Statement, Crypto Market Rallies
items.summary: Bitcoin hit $82,430 with a 57% trading volume spike, while Ethereum, XRP, and Dogecoin also rallied sharply despite stock futures slipping after President Trump’s statement on Iran. Over $380 million in positions were liquidated, mostly shorts, as market cap reached $2.68 trillion.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Hit $218 Million in 24 Hours, Led by Bitcoin and Ethereum
items.summary: The crypto derivatives market saw $218 million in liquidations, with Bitcoin at $91.5 million and Ethereum at $44 million, reflecting high volatility amid Bitcoin's push toward $82,000.

items.title: Sui (SUI) Surges 24% to Lead Major Crypto Gains, Trading at $1.33
items.summary: Sui recorded a 24.69% price increase to $1.33, driven by spiked trading volume and positive sentiment around ecosystem developments, standing out in a mixed market.

items.title: Over $163 Million in Crypto Long Positions Liquidated in 24 Hours
items.summary: Crypto markets experienced $163 million in long position liquidations, continuing leverage-driven selloffs amid ongoing volatility in 2026.

items.title: Dormant Bitcoin Whale Awakens After 12 Years, Transfers 500 BTC Worth $41 Million
items.summary: A long-dormant wallet moved 500 BTC on May 10, with similar whale activity recently preceding exchange deposits, as BTC trades near $80,900.

items.title: Solayer (LAYER) and TROLL Top Most-Searched Altcoins with 55.8% and 76.4% Gains
items.summary: CoinGecko's most-searched altcoins include Solayer up 55.8% and TROLL up 76.4% in 24 hours, highlighting interest in memecoins and AI projects amid surging altcoin activity.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Crimson Desert Patch 1.06 Released with New Mounts, Extraction Feature, and Unarmed Combat Buffs
items.summary: The latest update for Crimson Desert introduces new mounts like lions and raptors, an extraction function, and significant buffs to unarmed combat, marking one of the biggest patches yet.

items.title: ARC Raiders Expedition Update Introduces Trials Changes and Hard Reset for Players
items.summary: Embark Studios released a new update for ARC Raiders featuring Expedition Day details, trials modifications, and a hard reset affecting many players.

items.title: NBA 2K26 Best PG Build with Most Legend Badges Revealed
items.summary: A new top-tier 6'5 Point Guard build in NBA 2K26 boasts 11+ Legend badges, breaking records and dominating park and competitive modes.

items.title: Diablo 4 Lord of Hatred Expansion Enhances Endgame with Mythics, Tributes, and War Plans
items.summary: The latest Diablo 4 expansion improves endgame progression through new mythics, tributes, war plans, and boss content.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Nintendo Raises Switch 2 Prices Amid Chip Crisis
items.summary: Nintendo is increasing prices for the Switch 2 due to ongoing chip shortages, despite selling 19.86 million units last year, and forecasts a sales drop next year.

items.title: Samsung Rolls Out Bespoke Update for Smart Fridges
items.summary: Samsung's software upgrade for Bespoke refrigerators advances smart home appliances toward more practical consumer uses.

items.title: Whoop Adds In-App Video Consultations with Clinicians
items.summary: Whoop will enable users to consult licensed clinicians via app, with access to their health data for personalized advice.

items.title: GM Settles Lawsuit for $12.75M Over Driving Data Misuse
items.summary: General Motors agreed to pay $12.75 million to resolve a California lawsuit alleging it collected and sold customer driving data via OnStar to data brokers.

items.title: FCC Allows Updates for Banned Drones and Routers Until 2029
items.summary: The US Federal Communications Commission will permit software and firmware updates for banned Chinese drones and routers until January 2029.

items.title: Intel Signs Preliminary Deal to Produce Chips for Apple
items.summary: Intel has reportedly agreed to manufacture chips for Apple, echoing past partnerships amid current supply chain dynamics.

items.title: Boox Launches Tappy Wireless Page-Turning Remote
items.summary: Boox announced the Tappy, a Bluetooth remote for page-turning that works with e-readers and other devices.

items.title: Oakley Meta HSTN Smart Glasses Debut
items.summary: Oakley and Meta launched HSTN smart glasses, highlighted in recent tech coverage alongside EV advancements like regenerative braking.
